hero.name: Ivan Ostroumov
hero.tagline: Software developer building tools, applications, and solving technical problems.
hero.now: Right now: focused on Data Recovery & Digital Forensics, tinkering with Reflux on the side.

about.title: About
about.body1: I'm Ivan Ostroumov — a software developer who ends up building a bit of everything: desktop games, mobile apps, web tools, automation. If there's an interesting technical problem, I want to take it apart and see how it works.
about.body2: Right now my main professional focus is Data Recovery and Digital Forensics, but the projects below show the rest of it — game dev in Unity, Android apps, web scrapers, and the occasional experiment that doesn't quite make it to the finish line.
about.body3: I build software, experiment with technology, and turn ideas into working products.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: The best way to reach me is by email. Socials below as backup.
contactPage.formSuccess: Thanks — message sent, I'll get back to you soon.

seo.homeDescription: Ivan Ostroumov — software developer building tools, applications, and solving technical problems. Unity games, Android apps, web tools, and automation.
seo.aboutDescription: About Ivan Ostroumov: software developer with a background in Unity games, Android apps, web tools, and automation, currently focused on data recovery and digital forensics.
seo.servicesDescription: Software development, mobile apps, custom tools, automation, technical consulting, and data recovery / digital forensics services from Ivan Ostroumov.
seo.skillsDescription: Ivan Ostroumov's technical skills: C#, Java, Kotlin, PHP, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Android and backend development, Git, Linux, cloud, automation, and digital forensics.
seo.projectsDescription: Software projects by Ivan Ostroumov: Unity games including Beat the Piano and SAMT: All Stars, the Parserize web tool, and more.
seo.toolsDescription: Downloadable tools built by Ivan Ostroumov, including Rhyme Studio and World Travel Tracker.
seo.contactDescription: Contact Ivan Ostroumov by email, GitHub, Telegram, WhatsApp, or LinkedIn.
